n: Prologue, Chapter 2: Skills of an Adventurer

steps.t: You have demonstrated the skill <rgb=#00ff00>Fiery Ridicule</rgb> for Tegwyn. Will he relinquish the Uruk's blade to you, as he agreed?
You have demonstrated how to consume <rgb=#ffff00>Battle Attunement</rgb> to use <rgb=#00ff00>Shocking Words</rgb>. Will Tegwy…
You have fulfilled your end of the bargain. Will Tegwyn relinquish the Uruk's blade to you, as he agreed?
Meneldir is by the east gate of Mossward. Now that you have recovered the Uruk blade, you should bring it to Meneldir.
